variables.name: PastGruntsSoundsGestures
variables.description: 21 Spoke no words but communicated with grunts sounds andor gestures such as head nods shoulder shrugs or pointing

variables.name: PastPhrasesOrSentences
variables.description: 23 Communication included 23 word phrases or short sentences

variables.name: PresentDoesNotCommunicate
variables.description: 16 Does not communicate with gestures sounds or words

variables.name: PresentGruntsSoundsGestures
variables.description: 17 Speaks no words but communicates with grunts sounds andor gestures such as head nods should shrugs or pointing

variables.name: PresentPhrasesOrSentences
variables.description: 19 Communication includes 23 word phrases or short sentences

variables.name: TantrumEmotionalMix
variables.description: Choose the item showing the most common mix of your childs tantrum emotions

variables.name: TantrumFrequency
variables.description: How frequent were your childs tantrums in the past month choose 1

variables.name: _10Fidgets
variables.description: 10 Cant seem to sit still Fidgets wiggles around or slides off chair

variables.name: _11LargeComplexMovements
variables.description: 11 Makes large complex movements of herhis body such as spinning twirling or repeatedly bouncing up and down

variables.name: _12ExaminesNewObjects
variables.description: 12 Examples or manipulates some novel or unfamiliar objects repeatedly

variables.name: _12UnderstoodSimpleWords
variables.description: 12 Understood simple words eg byebye mama dada

variables.name: _13ComprehendedQuestions
variables.description: 13 Comprehended questions for example Do you want to eat do you want a bath

variables.name: _13TreatsNewFamiliarObjectsSam
variables.description: 13 Treats new and familiar objects the same way

variables.name: _14PlaysWithToysOddWays
variables.description: 14 Plays with toys and objects in odd ways eg spins the wheels on toy trucks

variables.name: _15MirrorsAndLights
variables.description: 15 Is excessively interested in mirrors andor lights

variables.name: _15MyChildUnderstoodAtThisBest
variables.description: 15 My child understood at this best level from age FromAge

variables.name: _15MyChildUnderstoodAtThisBest2
variables.description: 15 My child understood at this best level from age ToAge

variables.name: _16HoldsPosition
variables.description: 16 Sits or stands in one position for a long time

variables.name: _17SteadyPaceOfMovement
variables.description: 17 Moves from place to place at a steady pace Plays briefly with an object drops or tosses it moves to next one May seem to choose objects randomly

variables.name: _18NeverEngagesForLong
variables.description: 18 Never plays with one object or engages in one activity for very long

variables.name: _19RushingOrFrantic
variables.description: 19 Rushes from one activity to another may sometimes seem frantic

variables.name: _1EatsInedibleThings
variables.description: 1 Put everything in herhis mouth eats inedible things

variables.name: _20BehavioralRituals
variables.description: 20 Must do certain things in certain way or has behavioral routines or rituals that she insists on following

variables.name: _21UpsetRoutinesNotFollowed
variables.description: 21 Becomes very upset if accustomed routines are not followed These may include eating dressing bedtime play travel or other routines

variables.name: _22SameFacialExpression
variables.description: 22 Always has the same facial expression she does not often express emotion

variables.name: _23InappropriateEmotions
variables.description: 23 Expresses emotions inappropriate to the situation

variables.name: _24LaughsOrCries
variables.description: 24 Sometimes laughs or cries for no apparent reason

variables.name: _25LessAwareOfDanger
variables.description: 25 Is less aware of danger around the house eg would touch hot oven on the street or in the playground than other children hisher age

variables.name: _25MyChildExpressedHimAtThisBe
variables.description: 25 My child expressed himherself at this best level from age

variables.name: _25MyChildExpressedHimAtThisBe2
variables.description: 25 My child expressed himherself at this best level to age

variables.name: _26GoesIntoUnsafeAreas
variables.description: 26 Goes into unsafe areas runs out of house leaves school groups exits car into parking lot without warning

variables.name: _27MoreLikelyTryDangerousActiv
variables.description: 27 Is more likely to try dangerous activities such as climbing than other children hisher age

variables.name: _28LessFearful
variables.description: 28 Is less fearful of new strange or scary things than other children hisher age

variables.name: _2DistinguishesBetweenSounds
variables.description: 2 Distinguishes between sounds eg reacts differently to voices than to keys jingling

variables.name: _30FearfulOfParticularInsectsA
variables.description: 30 Is fearful of particular insects or animals

variables.name: _31AfraidSuddenMovements
variables.description: 31 Is afraid of sudden movements or people animals or objects

variables.name: _33ExaggeratedFearResponses
variables.description: 33 Has exaggerated fear responses to some new or harmless objects

variables.name: _34StartlesToLoudOrUnexpectedS
variables.description: 34 Startles body jumps or twitches to loud or unexpected sounds

variables.name: _36SitsAndWatches
variables.description: 36 Sits and watches others but does not join in

variables.name: _38UnusualSensoryInterest
variables.description: 38 More interested in the sight feel sound taste or smell of things or people than other children hisher age

variables.name: _39UsingOthersHandAsTool
variables.description: 39 Uses your hand as a tool or as if it were part of hisher body eg pointing with your finger putting your hand on a doorknob

variables.name: _3MouthsBitesOrChewsOnClothing
variables.description: 3 Mouths bites or chews on clothing

variables.name: _40DeliberatelyDisrupts
variables.description: 40 Deliberately disrupts disturbs or annoys others

variables.name: _41AvoidsEyeContact
variables.description: 41 Makes efforts to avoid other peoples gaze keeps head down looks away or turns away

variables.name: _42LooksFromCornersOfEyes
variables.description: 42 Looks at people from the corner of hisher eyes

variables.name: _44JoinsInWithOtherPeoplesEnjo
variables.description: 44 Joins in with other peoples enjoyment amusement or excitement

variables.name: _45DoesNotRecognizeEmotions
variables.description: 45 Doesnt seem to recognize or respond to other peoples emotion

variables.name: _46LacksEmpathyForOtherPeople
variables.description: 46 Lacks empathy for other peoples pain or distress

variables.name: _47ActivelySeeksComfortFromOth
variables.description: 47 Actively seeks comfort from familiar people

variables.name: _48PrefersLowerLevelsOfPhysica
variables.description: 48 Prefers lower levels of physical comfort such as hand holding versus higher levels such as hugging and cuddling

variables.name: _49SeeksComfortByBacking
variables.description: 49 Seeks comfort from parents by backing into them

variables.name: _4AttemptsToEatAnyFoodSheSees
variables.description: 4 Attempts to eat any food she sees

variables.name: _50DoesNotRespondToOffersOfHug
variables.description: 50 Does not respond to physical or verbal offers to be held or hugged

variables.name: _51AvoidsOrEscapesFromHugging
variables.description: 51 Avoids or escapes from holding or hugging

variables.name: _53DoesNotPayAttention
variables.description: 53 Does not pay attention when spoke to

variables.name: _55IsDemanding
variables.description: 55 Is demanding cant wait for anything

variables.name: _57IsDisobedient
variables.description: 57 Is disobedient does not obey my directives

variables.name: _5HoldsFoodInMouth
variables.description: 5 Holds food or drink in mouth awhile before swallowing

variables.name: _5UnderstandsSimpleWords
variables.description: 5 Understands simple words eg byebye mama dada

variables.name: _62HurtsSelf
variables.description: 62 Hurts self by biting self or banging head

variables.name: _63SuddenlyChargesAtPeople
variables.description: 63 Suddenly charges at people and hits kicks or bites them for no apparent reason There may be little or no apparent reason There may be little or no warning or obvious emotion

variables.name: _65RubsGenitalsWithHands
variables.description: 65 Rubs hisher genitals with hands inside or outside clothing

variables.name: _68TouchesOthersBreastsOrGenit
variables.description: 68 Touches or grabs other peoples breasts or genitals

variables.name: _6ComprehendsQuestions
variables.description: 6 Comprehends questions for example Do you want to eat do you want a bath

variables.name: _7MakesSmallRepMovements
variables.description: 7 Makes small repetitive movements of hand body or head

variables.name: _9DistinguishedBetweenSounds
variables.description: 9 Distinguished between sounds eg reacted differently to voices than to keys jingling

variables.name: _9WavesHandObjects
variables.description: 9 Moves hand or other objects in front of eyes for visual stimulation
